Class AbstractInfFlowPO

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractPO
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractOperationPO
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.po.AbstractInfFlowPO
All Implemented Interfaces:
InfFlowPO, IPersistablePO, ProofOblInput
Direct Known Subclasses:
BlockExecutionPO, InfFlowContractPO, LoopInvExecutionPO, SymbolicExecutionPO
public abstract class AbstractInfFlowPO extends AbstractOperationPO implements InfFlowPO
Abstract to customize AbstractPO and AbstractOperationPO.

    • printProofObligation

      public boolean printProofObligation(PrintWriter ps, Proof proof) throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: IPersistablePO
      Called to manifest the proof manifest the proof obligation configuration into the given PrintWriter If the method returns true, a \proofObligation statement was successfully written to the ps. Therefore, no \problem statement is printed.
      Specified by:
      printProofObligation in interface IPersistablePO
      Returns:
      true if a \proofObligation was written successfully.
      Throws:
      IOException
